revision.text: {{#ifeq:{{{preamble|}}}|no||This {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|{{main other|article|page}}}} contains '''[[phonetic transcription]]s in the [[International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA)'''. }}For an introductory guide on IPA symbols, see [[Help:IPA]].{{#ifeq:{{{brackets|}}}|no|| For the distinction between {{IPA|[ ]}}, {{IPA|/ /}} and {{angbr IPA| }}, see [[International Phonetic Alphabet#Brackets and transcription delimiters|IPA § Brackets and transcription delimiters]].}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{#ifeq:{{{preamble|}}}|no||This {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|{{main other|article|page}}}} contains '''[[phonetic transcription]]s in the [[International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA)'''. }}For an introductory guide on IPA symbols, see [[Help:IPA]].{{#ifeq:{{{brackets|}}}|no|| For the distinction between {{IPA|[ ]}}, {{IPA|/ /}} and {{angbr IPA| }}, see [[International Phonetic Alphabet#Brackets and transcription delimiters|IPA § Brackets and transcription delimiters]].}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

{{yesno|{{{preamble|yes}}}|no=|yes=This {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|{{main other|article|page}}}} contains '''[[phonetic transcription]]s in the [[International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA)'''. }}For an introductory guide on IPA symbols, see [[Help:IPA]].{{yesno|{{{brackets|yes}}}|no=|yes= For the distinction between {{IPA|[ ]}}, {{IPA|/ /}} and {{angbr IPA| }}, see [[International Phonetic Alphabet#Brackets and transcription delimiters|IPA § Brackets and transcription delimiters]].}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>

revision.comment: 1 revision imported: trying to do a last fix of these, they will be fixed and not bloat the site
revision.text: {{yesno|{{{preamble|yes}}}|no=|yes=This {{#if:{{{1|}}}|{{{1}}}|{{main other|article|page}}}} contains '''[[phonetic transcription]]s in the [[International Phonetic Alphabet]] (IPA)'''. }}For an introductory guide on IPA symbols, see [[Help:IPA]].{{yesno|{{{brackets|yes}}}|no=|yes= For the distinction between {{IPA|[ ]}}, {{IPA|/ /}} and {{angbr IPA| }}, see [[International Phonetic Alphabet#Brackets and transcription delimiters|IPA § Brackets and transcription delimiters]].}}<noinclude>{{documentation}}</noinclude>
